jcr:content.jcr:description: At AbbVie, our R&D teams are chasing bold goals. We are developing groundbreaking therapies and solutions for the well-being of our patients.
jcr:content.description: At AbbVie, our R&D teams are chasing bold goals.
jcr:content.title: Striving for Breakthroughs: First, Faster and for Patients

title.jcr:title: Where science finds its full potential

text.text: For research & development at AbbVie, science isn’t just a pursuit – it’s a promise. A commitment to take on the toughest challenges for patients, their families and the future.

teaser_copy_copy_cop_2071013707.jcr:description: Our research drives scientific progress, accelerating discovery and advancement. Backed by the rigor to refine relentlessly and the resolve to stay focused to the finish.
teaser_copy_copy_cop_2071013707.jcr:title:
At a glance:
R&D highlights

text.text: We focus our expertise where we can make a meaningful difference, advancing bold research that aims to raise the standard of care and transform patient outcomes.

video_copy_copy_copy.descriptiveIframeTitle: Discovery Files: The Eureka Moment Behind a Scientific Discovery
video_copy_copy_copy.title: R&D at AbbVie

text_copy_copy_copy.text: See how our people are shaping what’s next in medicine. Dive deeper into our therapeutic areas, technologies and the stories behind our science.

title.jcr:title: The tenacity to take on the toughest challenges

text_copy.text: Progress is never instant. That’s why every breakthrough is a story of persistence, collaboration and passion. Explore what inspires our teams to keep striving for better answers.

quote.quote: The culture of the lab is so important because science is a collective effort.

text_copy.text: From decoding complex diseases to unlocking the potential of innovative modalities, explore videos that reveal the science, technology and people powering innovation at AbbVie.

We're revealing the human effort behind health care innovation. Learn about the people who share bold ideas and introduce approaches that tackle medicine's toughest challenges working to turn optimism into outcomes.
Big science. Bold ideas. AbbVie scientists break down complex concepts that explain how medicine works in your body.

button_copy_copy_868105037.jcr:title: Unlock new ideas in less than 60 seconds

text_copy.text: We’re reimagining technology and tools to accelerate discovery and bring medicines to patients faster.

button_copy_copy.jcr:title: Step inside the Lab of the Future

text_copy.text: Every breakthrough begins with a question. Join our scientists as they decode complex biology, share the challenges they face, and reveal how discoveries move from lab to life.

item_1759341157007.cq:panelTitle: What diseases and conditions does AbbVie develop medicines for?
item_1759341157007.text: AbbVie’s research spans areas where we can make the biggest impact: immunology, oncology, neuroscience, eye care and medical aesthetics. Our scientists are tackling complex diseases in each field, dedicated to advancing therapies that can transform lives. Learn more about our areas of focus.

item_1759341166926.cq:panelTitle: What kinds of new technology does AbbVie use in its research?
item_1759341166926.text: From using AI to optimize drug design, to wearable devices that capture patient data in real time, to advanced robotics that streamline manufacturing, AbbVie leverages technology to enhance speed, quality and precision in R&D. These innovations expand the capabilities of our teams, empowering them to push boundaries further. See how we’re shaping the future of innovation.

item_1759341172358.cq:panelTitle: How is AbbVie leveraging artificial intelligence (AI)?
item_1759341172358.text: AI and machine learning are helping us accelerate every stage of drug discovery, from predicting how molecules will behave, to designing therapies faster, to reducing trial-and-error in the lab. These tools allow our scientists to see patterns that were once invisible, speeding up the path to new medicines. Explore AI and data convergence at AbbVie.

item_1759341180543.cq:panelTitle: How can I learn more about the R&D community at AbbVie?
item_1759341180543.text: Learn more about the people and teams shaping the future of science at AbbVie. Our scientists aren’t just advancing medicine, they are growing careers, sharing knowledge and working together in a culture built on curiosity and collaboration.

title.jcr:title: Where bold science meets real-world results

text.text: Join a team where your expertise fuels drug discovery, your ideas drive progress and your work can transform lives.
